description: 1. This component simulates ocean physics and dynamics. The model is described here: https://agupubs.onlinelibrary.wiley.com/doi/10.1029/2021MS002952. The model operates on a triangular grid at a nominal 20 km resolution. The grid is organized such that interior land points have been removed from the grid. The model vertical coordinate system is depth-based with a maximum depth of 5900 m. 2. Key physics parameterizations Physics parameterizations are described / referenced by Korn et al. (https://agupubs.onlinelibrary.wiley.com/doi/10.1029/2021MS002952) for velocity dissipation, vertical mixing, and eddy diffusion and advection, 3. Notable features Care was taken to increase resolution to the point that the model now operates in the eddy-permitting domain.
